upstash.cacheTtl: Cache TTL: 1 hour for everything except locks
upstash.stringDescription: Test string writes and overwrites (cache TTL: 1 hour)
upstash.hashDescription: Test Hash field writes (cache TTL: 1 hour)
upstash.listDescription: Test List enqueue and dequeue (cache TTL: 1 hour)
upstash.lockDescription: Compete for the same lock concurrently and observe successful critical-section entries
upstash.noOperation: No operation records yet. Run a test operation first.

actions.redisOk: Redis is available. Initialization and singleton access are working.
actions.redisUnavailable: Redis is unavailable. Check the Upstash environment variables.
actions.jsonQueryMissing: JSON does not exist or Redis is unavailable
actions.listWriteOk: List write succeeded. Current length: {length} (TTL: 1 hour)
actions.listPopEmpty: List is empty or Redis is unavailable
actions.counterUpdateOk: Counter updated successfully. Current value: {value} (TTL: 1 hour)

color.textSamples: Text (hero title / standard title / colored text)
color.description: Quickly preview the effect after switching themes

notFound.description: Quickly preview the 404 page in light and dark themes. Current theme: {themeLabel} / {themeClass} / {themeHex}

ui.initialAction: Click any button to view interaction logs
ui.title: Button and Icon Showcase
ui.description: This page centralizes common component demos, including Random Calendar, Global Icon, GradientButton, XButton, and more. New sections can be added below as needed.
ui.buttonVariants: Button variants integrated: default / soft / subtle

randomCalendar.title: Random Calendar Demo
randomCalendar.description: Covers standalone range selection, standalone calendar status view, and opening a range dialog from the calendar header to write planned states back.
randomCalendar.rangeOnlyDescription: Select a date range by dragging.
randomCalendar.rangePlaceholder: Click to select start and end dates
randomCalendar.calendarOnlyDescription: Tests month navigation, today positioning, saved/planned/warning status dots, and selected date changes.
randomCalendar.combinedDescription: Open range planning from the calendar header. After Apply, the range is written back as planned; the calendar shows only final states.
randomCalendar.noPlannedDates: No pending planned dates in the current range
randomCalendar.batchClearAction: Random Calendar: batch cleared {count} planned dates
randomCalendar.batchSaveAction: Random Calendar: batch saved {count} planned dates
randomCalendar.batchDescription: {count} planned dates are pending. Clear removes those planned states, while Save changes them to saved.

alert.title: Alert Dialog Demo
alert.description: Open ads, information, confirmation, and high-priority dialogs to check theme colors, dark mode, close buttons, and button semantics.
alert.adsDescription: Tests image rendering, image links, top-right close, optional cancel/confirm buttons, and the R2 test image.
alert.infoDescription: Single confirm button with info / warn / success / error semantics and visual states.
alert.confirmBaseDescription: Two-button confirmation dialogs. Normal follows theme color, danger uses destructive red, and undoable dialogs show two-phase confirmation.
alert.highPriorityDescription: Strong overlay, high z-index, and mandatory decision flow for interruptions, navigation, or state-loss scenarios.
alert.loadingDescription: After a button action closes the dialog, async callbacks run. Only actions matched by loadingActions show fullscreen Loading.
alert.undoableLoadingDescription: The first action only starts the countdown. Loading appears after confirm at countdown completion or after undo during the waiting period.
alert.undoableHint: Undoable: loadingActions ['confirm'] means onConfirm after countdown; loadingActions ['undo'] means Undo during the waiting period; pass ['confirm', 'undo'] when both are needed.

icons.title: Global Icon Full Showcase
icons.description: Supports fuzzy icon-name search. Click a card to copy `XxxIcon` usage.
icons.placeholder: Search icon name, such as search / arrow / chevron

gradient.title: GradientButton Demo
gradient.description: Shows the default gradient style plus soft, subtle, link, clicked, disabled, alignment, and press-feedback states.
gradient.pressDescription: Tap quickly to observe the 180ms pressed flash. Press styles only change transform / brightness / shadow and do not override the theme background.

xbutton.title: XButton Demo
xbutton.description: Shows single and split modes to verify default, soft, subtle, and press-feedback states.
xbutton.pressDescription: single, split main, and dropdown trigger use independent pressed keys. Menu items close immediately after click and do not show flash for now.

toggle.title: XToggleButton Demo
toggle.description: Tests single-choice toggles, floating badges, and linked previews for icon-only, text-only, accent, and link-like button shapes.
toggle.mobileIconDescription: Mobile shows icons, web shows text.

pill.title: Pill Select Demo
pill.description: Groups default and compact variants together for direct comparison of size and layout differences.
pill.tokenPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

interaction.title: Interaction Log
interaction.description: Button clicks appear here so loading and event behavior can be verified.
interaction.extensionNote: If this page continues to grow, add new sections such as `Card`, `Badge`, `Dialog`, `Loading`, or `Pricing`.

dialogs.adsDescription: Tests ad dialog image rendering, image click link, close button, and themed button styles.
dialogs.infoDescription: A normal information prompt used to test the info icon, border, background, and confirm button.
dialogs.warnDescription: A warning prompt used to test warn readability in light and dark themes.
dialogs.successDescription: The operation has completed. This dialog checks success semantic color and single-button confirmation.
dialogs.errorDescription: The operation failed. Please try again later. This dialog checks red error styling.
dialogs.infoLoadingDescription: Click Got it to close the dialog immediately and show fullscreen Loading for 2 seconds.
dialogs.normalDescription: A normal confirmation dialog for testing cancel, confirm, top-right close, and themed confirm button.
dialogs.dangerDescription: A danger confirmation dialog for destructive actions such as delete, clear, or reset.
dialogs.reversedDescription: A normal confirmation dialog with reversed emphasis. Apply is the normal flow, while Cancel discards generated data and is emphasized.
dialogs.reversedCancel: ConfirmDialog: reversed canceled and discarded result
dialogs.confirmLoadingDescription: Click Apply to close the dialog and show Loading. Cancel remains a normal close/callback.
dialogs.cancelLoadingDescription: Click Discard Result to close the dialog and show Loading. Apply does not trigger loading.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Click Delete to enter a waiting period. You can undo during the countdown; deletion runs only after the countdown.
dialogs.deletePending: Delete is scheduled. Click Undo before the countdown ends to revert.
dialogs.archiveDescription: Click Archive to start the countdown without Loading. Loading appears when onConfirm runs after the countdown.
dialogs.archivePending: Archive will run after the countdown. Undo is still available during this phase.
dialogs.replaceDescription: Click Replace to start the countdown. Clicking Undo during the countdown closes the dialog and shows Loading.
dialogs.replacePending: Click Undo to simulate restoring staged business state and show Loading.
dialogs.publishDescription: Click Publish to start the countdown. Waiting for completion or clicking Undo both close the dialog and show Loading.
dialogs.publishPending: Without action, publishing runs after the countdown. Undo cancels publishing. Both paths show Loading.
dialogs.highPriorityDescription: A high-priority confirmation dialog for testing strong overlay, high z-index, close button, and binary decisions.
dialogs.highPriorityLoadingDescription: Click Leave to close the high-priority dialog and show Loading until draft saving is simulated.
